summary: Markets show mixed sentiment today with Bitcoin viewed as a buy-on-dip opportunity amid slight pullback, while gold continues to decline due to rising US interest rates. Equities face cliff-edge risks if tech giants disappoint, and commodities like crude oil are noted as down amid surplus supply. Overall mood is cautious with bearish pressure on non-yielding assets.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin is about to dump 10%, warning traders on how to position for the downside.

signals.name: Altcoins
signals.reason: Need to long these altcoins before Bitcoin hits $82K.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: Gold continues to fall below $4600 as US interest rates rise, making non-yielding assets undesirable.[2]

signals.name: Brent Crude Oil
signals.reason: Crude oil is down amid global surplus supply, leading commodities lower similar to 2022-23 patterns.[4]
